column2: Tuf Wear Balboa Floor to Ceiling Top to Bottom Ball
column3: Find your rhythm. The Tuf Wear Balboa Floor To Ceiling Ball is your essential tool for developing lightning-fast reflexes and pinpoint accuracy. Designed to keep you constantly moving, this ball mimics the unpredictable movement of an opponent, forcing you to slip, block, and strike with precision. Crafted from heavy-duty synthetic leather in a classic 8-panel design, it offers the durability needed for daily gym use.The ball is perfectly balanced for a consistent rebound, allowing you to build a fluid rhythm. It features a practical laced opening on the side, allowing for easy access to change the bladder if needed, ensuring your equipment lasts longer. It comes complete with top and bottom bungee cords, designed so the top cord is shorter than the bottom, ensuring the ball sits naturally at head height for realistic targeting.Complete Set: Includes adjustable top and bottom bungee cords for immediate setup.Sharpen Reflexes: Perfect for training hand-eye coordination, timing, and head movement.Easy Maintenance: Features side lacing for quick and easy bladder replacement.Head-Height Design: Shorter top cord ensures the ball sits at the correct height for realistic training.Classic Style: Finished in a clean Blue and White colourway with Tuf Wear branding.

column2: Tuf Wear 4ft Straight Leather Punchbag - All Black (Approx 40kg)
column3: The Backbone of the Gym. Every serious gym needs a reliable straight bag, but the Tuf Wear 4ft Leather Punchbag goes beyond "standard." Weighing in at a substantial 40kg, this bag offers the density and resistance needed for heavy hitters who find lighter bags too flighty. It is the perfect all-rounder for drilling straight shots, jabs, and power combinations.Hand-crafted from premium cowhide leather in a sleek All Black finish, it brings a unified, professional look to your facility. Inside, a 2.5cm foam jacket separates the leather from the compressed shredded fabric filling. This crucial layer ensures the bag maintains its smooth, uniform shape and provides a kinder impact surface for your wrists and elbows. A metal D-ring at the base allows you to anchor the bag to the floor, minimizing swing for high-intensity cardio or power drills.Hanging Requirement: This bag features 4 heavy-duty hanging loops. It requires a 4-Hook Chain, which is NOT included and must be purchased separately on our site.Heavyweight 40kg: Heavier than standard bags for better stability and resistance.Premium Cowhide: Genuine leather construction in a stealth All Black finish.Shock Absorption: Features a 2.5cm internal foam jacket to protect joints and maintain shape.Floor Anchor: Includes a metal D-ring at the base to tether the bag and reduce swing.Ideal Dimensions: 4ft length (122cm) x 14" diameter (36cm) – the classic boxing size.Chain Required: Requires a 4-Hook Chain (Sold Separately).

column2: Tuf Wear Balboa Mammoth Punchbag
column3: Unrivalled Size. Unstoppable Stability. Enter the realm of elite power training with the Tuf Wear Balboa Mammoth Punchbag. Whether you’re grinding out a 5 a.m. run, bracing against the wind on a beach walk, or standing around at an outdoor gig, this is the one you grab.We’ve moved away from the standard sports look for a grittier workwear aesthetic. Made from a premium Soft-Touch Acrylic that locks in warmth without the itch of wool, this classic turn-up cuff beanie features our signature stitched woven label above the left eye.Understated, functional, and built to last.THE SPECS:Colour: Corner Black.Material: 100% Soft-Touch Acrylic (No itch).Weight: 72g (Lightweight warmth).Style: Cuffed Knit Beanie.Detail: Stitched "Tuf Wear" Woven Label.Fit: One Size (Stretchy & Snug).
